experts.title: Community & Expert Advice

experts.forumDesc: Discuss disease prevention and share your success stories with 10k+ farmers.

detection.title: Disease Detection
detection.subtitle: Upload a photo of your crop leaf to get an instant diagnosis.
detection.tip1: Upload a clear, close-up photo of a single leaf.
detection.tip2: Ensure good lighting and avoid blurry images.
detection.tip3: Only plant/crop leaves are supported. Other images will be rejected.
detection.aiReference: Our AI has cross-referenced your sample with over 50,000 agricultural data points.

library.title: Crop Disease Library
library.subtitle: Browse our comprehensive database of plant diseases.

history.title: Analysis History
history.subtitle: Review your past crop scans and AI recommendations.

chatbot.title: AI Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Namaste! I am your AI Crop Assistant. Ask me anything about crop diseases and treatments.
chatbot.error: Sorry, I am having trouble connecting to the server. Please try again.
